metadata.title: Iran — the IRGC/bonyad economy, the oil-to-China shadow-fleet lifeline, the degraded Axis of Resistance, and the post-strike nuclear program
metadata.status: the IRGC/bonyad GDP share, oil-to-China figures, sanctions, the June-2025 strikes, and the proxy degradation are FACT (Clingendael/Treasury/IAEA/INSS/reporting); the 'parastatal capture' and 'axis collapse' readings are graded; composition guard applied
metadata.frame: The third leg of the sanctioned-petrostate set (with Russia + the SE-Asia/Venezuela shadow networks). Four strands: (1) the IRGC/BONYAD complex that controls >50% of Iran's GDP and is granted ~51% of oil/gas export revenue; (2) the OIL-TO-CHINA lifeline run through the SAME shadow fleet + ship-to-ship transfers + Chinese 'teapot' refineries that move Russian crude (the shared evasion infrastructure); (3) the AXIS OF RESISTANCE (Hezbollah/Hamas/Houthis/Syria) — severely degraded in 2024-25 (Assad's fall, the Israel-Hezbollah war, the proxies' inaction during the strikes on Iran); (4) the NUCLEAR program after the June-2025 '12-Day War' strikes (Israel + US Operation Midnight Hammer on Fordow/Natanz/Isfahan). Ties to spec-russia-state-network (shared shadow fleet), spec-semiconductor-logistics-standards (Houthi/Red-Sea chokepoint), spec-blockchain-ecosystem (sanctions-evasion crypto), OFAC/FinCEN.

the_irgc_bonyad_complex: Iran's 'commanding heights' are controlled by a military-bonyad complex: the IRGC + the revolutionary-religious foundations (bonyads) run a parastatal network estimated at >50% of GDP. The 2025 budget granted ~51% of oil/gas export revenue (~EUR12B) to the IRGC + Law Enforcement Command. Meanwhile the civilian economy is in crisis: IMF forecasts ~69% inflation (2026), food inflation ~90% YoY — the parastatal elite captures the revenue while the population bears the collapse (graded). grade: fact (the GDP share, budget allocation, inflation).
the_oil_to_china_lifeline: Iran's fiscal lifeline is oil to China: ~90% of Iran's oil exports go to China, ~90% absorbed by independent 'teapot' refineries, moved via the SAME shadow-fleet + ship-to-ship-transfer infrastructure that handles Russian (and Venezuelan) crude — the shared sanctions-evasion maritime system. US Treasury escalated in 2026: sanctioning a major Chinese refinery + 40 shipping firms, and FinCEN flagged a ~$5B shell-company shadow-banking network moving the oil proceeds back from China. grade: fact (the figures, the 2026 sanctions).
the_axis_degradation: The 'Axis of Resistance' (Hezbollah, Hamas, Iraqi militias, the Houthis, and — until Dec 2024 — Assad's Syria) was Iran's forward-defense/deterrence network. It was severely DEGRADED in 2024-25: the Gaza war, the Israel-Hezbollah war (leadership decapitated), and the FALL OF ASSAD (rebels took Damascus, ending the land bridge). The decisive signal: during the June-2025 Israeli/US strikes on Iran itself, the proxies took virtually NO offensive action — and senior Iranian officials concede Iran has 'lost control of the Houthis,' who keep attacking Red Sea shipping on their own account. grade: fact (the losses, the inaction); 'axis collapse' is the supported reading.
the_yuan_settlement: Why is Iran paid in YUAN, not dollars? Two reasons, and the second is the catch. (1) EVASION/DE-DOLLARIZATION: pricing and settling oil in RMB through China's CIPS rail (not USD/SWIFT) keeps the trade outside the reach of US dollar-clearing sanctions — the same logic as Russia's CIPS use. (2) THE TRAP: the yuan is NOT freely convertible (capital controls), so Iran's oil proceeds accumulate as RMB largely STUCK in Chinese bank accounts — usable mainly to buy Chinese goods, not to obtain hard currency. Iran has repeatedly complained of billions in funds effectively FROZEN/trapped in China. So 'paid in yuan' is simultaneously sanctions-evasion AND a form of Chinese LEVERAGE over a captive supplier — discounted oil in, non-convertible scrip out. This is the realistic read of the 'suspicious' yuan demand: not a master-plan, but an asymmetric dependency that benefits Beijing. It also advances China's broader RMB-internationalization push (cf. spec-cross-border-settlement-rails / CIPS). grade: fact (RMB settlement, CIPS, capital controls, trapped-funds complaints); the 'leverage' framing is graded interpretation.
the_nuclear_program: The 12-Day War (13-24 June 2025): Israel ran ~360 airstrikes across Iran (killing ~30 senior IRGC commanders + 11 nuclear scientists), and on 22 June 2025 the US struck Fordow, Natanz, and Isfahan (Operation Midnight Hammer). Damage assessments DIVERGE: Israel said the program was set back 'by many years'; IAEA's Grossi assessed Iran could resume enrichment in 'a matter of months.' Talks stalled; Iran's exact residual enrichment capacity + HEU stockpile location is contested. grade: fact (the strikes); the setback magnitude is contested.
the_honest_reading: Iran is a sanctioned petrostate where a security-clerical elite (IRGC/bonyads) captures the oil revenue — sold to China via the shared shadow-fleet evasion system — while the population absorbs ~69% inflation; its regional deterrence (the Axis) has been hollowed out (Assad gone, proxies inert, Houthis off-leash); and its nuclear program has been damaged to a contested degree. The structural parallel to Russia is exact: parastatal capture + oil-to-China-via-shadow-fleet + sanctions-evasion banking + fiscal strain. The composition guard holds (the regime is factionalized; the proxies are increasingly autonomous, not a single controlled hand). Overlay; excluded from the proofs.
